data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures that data between users and YouTube servers is encrypted.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL protocols employed for data transmission security.

data.title: Anti-Phishing Mechanisms
data.description: Protects users from phishing attempts by verifying user actions and identities.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protects against Distributed Denial of Service attacks to ensure service availability.
data.technical_spec: Advanced network filtering and Google Cloud Armor implementations.

data.title: Spam Detection Algorithms
data.description: Proactively identifies and mitigates spam interactions and content.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models trained on large datasets.

data.title: Account Security Alerts
data.description: Notifies users of suspicious activities and security breaches.
data.technical_spec: Integration with Google account security features.
